title: Republic Treasury Audit Division
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Republic Treasury Audit Division''' was a division of the [[Republic Treasury/Legends|Republic Treasury]] responsible for investigating internal cases of fraud within government departments and organizations of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Known agents==
*[[Besany Wennen]]
*[[Jilka Zan Zentis]]

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''
*''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' {{Mo}}
